items.title: Quick Start
items.content: Get started with OCTOPUS in under 5 minutes. Learn the basics of project initialization and your first commands.

items.title: Installation
items.content: Download and install OCTOPUS. Choose between minimal, full, or clone installation options.

items.title: /o Command
items.content: The workflow orchestration command. Plan, build, fix, explain, refactor, test, ship, learn. Auto-switches between Plan and Agent modes.

items.title: /o? Deep Init
items.content: Initialize and deeply understand your project. All arms active, Unshelled Protocol engaged. Single command for complete project awareness.

items.title: /o plan
items.content: Research-Plan-Execute protocol. Build mental map, show reasoning, wait for approval before coding.

items.title: /o build
items.content: Create implementations. Production-ready code with error handling, edge cases, proper types. No TODOs, no placeholders.

items.title: /o fix
items.content: Debug and fix issues. Reproduce, localize, root cause analysis, minimal fix, prevention.

items.title: /d Command
items.content: Design intelligence command. Scan, page, component, feature, check, adapt. Extract and apply Design Genome.

items.title: /d scan
items.content: Extract Design Genome from existing UI. Colors, typography, spacing, patterns.

items.title: /r Command
items.content: Full review command. DNA validation plus 8-perspective analysis. Security, performance, accessibility, maintainability.

items.title: Plan Mode
items.content: Architectural reasoning before coding. Research first, show your work, present plan, wait for approval.

items.title: Build Mode
items.content: Implementation mode. Complete, production-ready code. Match project patterns exactly.

items.title: Fix Mode
items.content: Debugging mode. 5 Whys root cause analysis, minimal safe fixes, prevention.

items.title: Explain Mode
items.content: Teaching mode. Adapt depth to developer level. TL;DR, explanation, examples, key points.

items.title: Refactor Mode
items.content: Safe restructuring. Change structure, not behavior. Tests pass before and after.

items.title: Test Mode
items.content: Test-driven development. Happy path, edge cases, errors. Red-green-refactor cycle.

items.title: Ship Mode
items.content: Deployment checklist. Quality, review, docs, deploy, rollback, monitor.

items.title: Learn Mode
items.content: Memory and adaptation. Record preferences, patterns, corrections. Evolve with every interaction.

items.title: Camouflage Protocol
items.content: Match existing patterns exactly. Never suggest different conventions. Scan automatically, blend in perfectly.

items.title: Anti-Slop Protocol
items.content: No lazy output. No TODOs, no placeholders, no incomplete implementations. Production-ready only.

items.title: Shadow Workspace
items.content: Code validation before showing. Draft, lint, correction, verification, commit. Trust the system.

items.title: Dynamic Context Discovery
items.content: Tiered search strategy. Semantic search for patterns, grep for symbols, reading agent for exploration.

items.title: Unshelled Protocol
items.content: Raw intelligence unleashed. Research first, all tools orchestrated, all arms active, complete implementation, show your work.

items.title: Nine Minds Architecture
items.content: Brain 0 (Orchestrator) plus 8 arms: Parser, Analyzer, Historian, Pattern Detector, Relationship Mapper, Predictor, Communicator, Learner.

items.title: Brain 0 - Orchestrator
items.content: Sees the whole. Connects the pieces. Makes it work. Understands the developer's intent.

items.title: Arm 1 - Parser
items.content: Reads structure. Understands syntax. Sees the skeleton. Reads between the lines.

items.title: Arm 2 - Analyzer
items.content: Finds problems. Sees risks. Measures quality. Knows what will break.

items.title: Arm 3 - Historian
items.content: Remembers changes. Understands evolution. Knows the story.

items.title: Arm 4 - Pattern Detector
items.content: Sees patterns. Recognizes conventions. Matches style.

items.title: Arm 5 - Relationship Mapper
items.content: Maps connections. Traces dependencies. Understands flow.

items.title: Arm 6 - Predictor
items.content: Anticipates needs. Sees risks. Plans ahead.

items.title: Arm 7 - Communicator
items.content: Adapts language. Matches tone. Speaks clearly.

items.title: Arm 8 - Learner
items.content: Remembers. Adapts. Evolves. Becomes better with every interaction.
